query: 接触前是否有抖动或急动
prompt:
Propose one bounded pre-target-contact motion metric for the Query.
Query: 接触前是否有抖动或急动
The runtime, not you, selects the active TCP: it reads the initial block_position x coordinate (x < 0 => left, otherwise right). Do not return a signal name or Python code.
The only compiler family is a physical-time-normalized finite difference of order 2 or 3 over a bounded pre-contact window, reduced by peak L2. Choose the semantics and a meaningful metric_id within that family.
Compatible validated run-local metrics are listed below. A paraphrase may reuse one only by copying all its executable fields exactly. Otherwise choose a new metric_id.
registered_metric_summaries:
[]
Return JSON only with this exact schema:
{
  "schema_version": 2,
  "metric_id": "new descriptive snake_case id, or an existing id only when copying that registered executable spec exactly",
  "finite_difference_order": "2 or 3",
  "window_seconds": "physical seconds in [0.02, 5.0]",
  "reducer": "peak_l2",
  "time_normalization": "physical_seconds",
  "threshold": "positive finite number <= 1e12",
  "unit": "m_per_second_squared for order 2, or m_per_second_cubed for order 3",
  "null_semantics": "null_if_no_target_contact_or_insufficient_precontact_samples",
  "rationale": "1-500 character semantic explanation"
}
